data.Name: Avepoint Inc
data.Description: AvePoint Inc. (AVPT) is a leading provider of advanced data management solutions designed specifically for Microsoft 365 and other collaboration platforms, focusing on governance, compliance, and data protection. With organizations increasingly prioritizing digital transformation, AvePoint offers a robust suite of products that enhance operational efficiency while ensuring the security of critical data assets. The company's innovative approach and dedication to customer needs position it favorably to capitalize on the growing demand for resilient data management solutions in an evolving cloud landscape, presenting a compelling opportunity for institutional investors seeking growth in the technology sector.
data.Address: 525 WASHINGTON BOULEVARD, JERSEY CITY, NJ, UNITED STATES, 07310
